text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Pathetic... I didn't even make it on the
scoreboard. Everyone was so good, I didn't even
stand a chance...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But still... I'm gonna take this pain, this
frustration... and use it as fuel!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Haaah! I'll show everyone what I can really do!
choice_data_list: ...Do you really think that's enough to win?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's review today's race right away!
We've gotta strike while the iron is hot!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If we put our heads together, I just know I'll catch
up to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...I know I'm still not good enough. But I do mean
everything I say.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to use everything I've got to keep on
charging forward!
